# Free Cert Lookup — MEOK AI Labs | Verify a Signed Ed25519 Attestation

> Paste a MEOK attestation cert_id, get the signed JSON-LD payload back. Free, no signup, sovereign UK infrastructure.

## Overview
Free Cert Lookup — MEOK AI Labs | Verify a Signed Ed25519 Attestation is part of the MEOK AI Labs sovereign compliance and attestation platform.
